title: Services retirement — migration PRs to phenotype-org-audits + phenodocs (Step 3 of ADR-040)
author: KooshaPari

prs_authored.pr_title: chore(audits): archive KooshaPari/services content (L5-114, ADR-040 Step 3)
prs_authored.pr_body:
Migrates the salvageable content from KooshaPari/services (CycloneDX SBOM registry, scheduled for retirement per L5-114) into phenotype-org-audits/audits/services/ for permanent archival.

**Migration matrix (per findings/2026-06-18-L5-114-services-retirement.md):**
- BLOCK-C-AUDIT.md (canonical fleet-history audit, 2026-06-15)
- BLOCK-C-CONSOLIDATION-PLAN.md (consolidation plan, 2026-06-16)
- audit_scorecard-2026-06-18.json (30-pillar scorecard, grade D, overall 46)
- ci.yml (TruffleHog + JSON validation; archived for history)
- 2 SBOMs (graphql-gateway, templates-registry; CycloneDX 1.3 from 2026-04-26; stale snapshots archived for fleet-history)

**ADR-040 alignment:**
- Step 1 (audit artifact) — DONE 2026-06-18 (findings/2026-06-18-L5-114-services-retirement.md)
- Step 2 (90-day retention window) — DONE 2026-06-18 (in finding §5)
- Step 3 (4 manual UI delete URLs) — DONE 2026-06-18 (in finding §4)
- Step 3.5 (this PR — migration content to target repos) — IN PROGRESS
- Step 4 (archive source) — PENDING (after this PR merges + phenodocs PR merges)
- Step 5 (UI delete) — PENDING (operator action, 90-day window)

**Verification:**
- phenotype-org-audits/audits/services/ did not exist before this PR (verified via `gh api repos/KooshaPari/phenotype-org-audits/contents/audits/services` → 404)
- All 6 source files copied verbatim from KooshaPari/services@main (commit 4b26f7e2 governance baseline + 1394592 wip pre-push snapshot)
- 0 net content loss; the 2 SBOMs are fleet-history (per Block-C §11) not fleet-truth

**Refs:**
- findings/2026-06-18-L5-114-services-retirement.md (audit artifact)
- ADR-040 (5-step deletion recipe)
- ADR-037 (4-repo retirement template — multi-repo variant)
- v8 plan § 3.6 Track T14 (L8-020)

prs_authored.pr_title: docs(security): archive SBOM-registry threat model (L5-114, ADR-040 Step 3)
prs_authored.pr_body:
Migrates the SBOM-registry-specific threat model from KooshaPari/services (CycloneDX SBOM registry, scheduled for retirement per L5-114) into phenodocs/docs/security/ for permanent archival.

**Why a separate file:**
- phenodocs/docs/security/threat-model.md is the main STRIDE-per-component template (general-purpose)
- This file (sbom-registry-threat-model.md) is the SBOM-registry-specific threat model: assets (CycloneDX SBOMs, registry metadata, signing keys), threats (registry tampering, signing key compromise, PURL normalization parser bugs), mitigations
- Different scope, different content; both should coexist

**Source:** services/docs/security/THREAT_MODEL.md (4235 bytes, 33 lines per L5-114 finding §2)

**ADR-040 alignment:** Step 3.5 of the 5-step deletion recipe.

**Refs:**
- findings/2026-06-18-L5-114-services-retirement.md
- ADR-040
- Block-C audit (services/docs/audit/BLOCK-C-AUDIT.md)

next_steps: Open PR to KooshaPari/phenotype-org-audits (via gh pr create)
Open PR to KooshaPari/phenodocs (via gh pr create)
Close services PR #1 (dependabot actions/checkout 6 bump — irrelevant to retirement)
After both PRs merge: archive KooshaPari/services via `gh api -X PATCH repos/KooshaPari/services -f archived=true`
Update findings/2026-06-18-L5-114-services-retirement.md to mark Step 3.5 + Step 4 done
